description: Five major improvements to bring Bloom Social to institutional/production grade quality.

epics.title: Intuitive Paragraph Anchoring
epics.description: Research-backed, best-in-class anchoring UX. Current implementation too rigid.
research: Kindle - tap to highlight, contextual actions
Google Docs - comment threads on selections
epics.targetUX: Selection-based popover with quick actions (Anchor, Highlight, Ask AI). No mode switching required. Anchor indicator appears as subtle margin dot that expands on hover.
acceptanceCriteria: Text selection triggers floating action popover (not click on paragraph)
Anchored paragraphs show subtle brass dot in margin
Clicking anchor dot in chat scrolls reader + highlights paragraph
Mobile: long-press to select, same popover
Keyboard: Cmd+Shift+A to anchor current selection

epics.title: Discord-Style Voice Chat
epics.description: Real-time voice chat in reading rooms, as easy as Discord.
epics.targetUX: One-click join voice. See who's speaking (voice activity indicator). Push-to-talk or voice activation. Mute/deafen controls. Low latency.
acceptanceCriteria: Voice toggle button in room header
Visual indicator showing who's speaking (green ring around avatar)
Graceful fallback if no mic permission

epics.title: Shareable Room Invite Links
epics.description: One-click invite link generation and join flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Share button in room generates unique invite URL
Invite codes are short (6-8 chars), human-readable
Clicking link → login if needed → auto-join room
Link shows room preview (book title, participant count) before joining

epics.title: Production Architecture
epics.description: Dockerized, CI/CD ready, proper database setup.
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose.yml for local dev (postgres, redis, app)
Prisma schema for users, rooms, participants, messages, invites

epics.title: Stripe Payment Integration
acceptanceCriteria: Billing portal link for managing subscription
Upgrade prompts when hitting free tier limits
Test mode working with Stripe test keys
